caribbean.headline: Tropical Weather Hits Bahamas
caribbean.paragraph: Freeport in the Bahamas is experiencing 16 kt winds and 2.5 ft wave heights with a 100% rain probability, while nearby Martinique has 12 kt winds. The dominant swell direction is southeast, affecting marine activities in these ports with less than 10% rain probability not being a concern today as heavy rain is expected in Freeport.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Increase
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 23 kt winds with a 25% rain probability and 5.4 ft wave heights, while Dubrovnik has 18 kt winds, making for a moderate day at these Eastern and Central Mediterranean ports. I am monitoring the situation as winds and waves are expected to remain elevated, with the dominant swell direction coming from the NNE at a 6 s period.
